description: Run long shell commands as background tasks: start them, keep working, collect the results later
name: io.github.RohitYajee8076/backburner

environmentVariables.description: Directory for the task database and log files (default: ~/.backburner)
environmentVariables.name: BACKBURNER_HOME

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated regexes; if set, only matching commands may run
environmentVariables.name: BACKBURNER_ALLOW

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated regexes; matching commands are always refused (deny wins over allow)
environmentVariables.name: BACKBURNER_DENY
